title: n8n-io/n8n
friendlyTitle: n8n connects AI to everyday apps and workflows
summary: n8n is a mature fair-code workflow automation platform combining a visual builder, custom code, AI features and more than 400 integrations. With roughly 197,000 stars and continued daily development, it was one of the most popular AI-capable repositories in today’s GitHub Trending collection.
friendlySummary: n8n is a popular workflow tool with a visual editor, custom code, AI features and hundreds of app connections. You can run it yourself or use its cloud service.
whyItMatters: Use n8n to connect models and agents to email, databases, business apps and approval steps while keeping the workflow visible and editable. It is particularly useful when an AI action needs deterministic checks, retries or a human gate before it affects a real system.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Use it to connect AI with real tasks while keeping clear steps, checks and approvals. This can make automation easier to understand and control.
